checks: current build loads historical conversation records
current build loads historical provider presets and defaults reachability metadata
current build exports a backup from upgraded historical state
current build restores that backup without losing upgraded state
unrelated local window-state data remains preserved during restore
boundary: The historical build predates backup export/restore UI, so the validated boundary is historical local data -> current migration/load -> current backup export/restore. This does not prove installer-version metadata behavior because both builds report 1.0.0.
